title: Luminous Tag
description: Adds the DECORATIVE TAG - an item utilized by LUMINOUS and LUMINOUS:NETHER
body:
![The Decorative tag is an item utilized by the LUMINOUS series of mods. It is an optional dependency, and it allows players to craft decorative blocks/items across all my compatible mods with a single item!](https://i.imgur.com/bvd6Lhn.png)

Download LUMINOUS [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-luminous-mod)
